note: Fixture maturity. `planned` / `research-ready` / `reviewable` are authoring stages set on the fixture. `reviewed` / `approved` / `disputed` are DERIVED only from the append-only review ledger and are never set by hand.

planned: may contain an incomplete synthetic scenario

gateNaming.fixtureTemplateCountMin: counts scenario templates of any maturity; NEVER implies approval
gateNaming.researchReadyFixtureCountMin: counts fixtures at research-ready or higher
gateNaming.approvedExpertFixtureCountMin: counts fixtures DERIVED as approved from the review ledger; the only gate that may unlock the symbolic evaluator phase
